description: Living eval regression suite — initial delivery (p1.6). One outcome-oriented scenario per core skill currently in .github/skills/. Each scenario guards against a real failure pattern and must pass on every subsequent assurance gate run.

scenarios.description: benefit-metric skill produces an artefact with at least one named metric and a non-empty baseline value
scenarios.expectedOutcome: benefit-metric artefact written to artefacts/
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill emits a metric list with no baseline values, making M-series targets unverifiable at DoD
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for artefact existence and named metric presence — not for which questions were asked during elicitation

scenarios.description: bootstrap skill creates all required pipeline scaffold files in the target repository
scenarios.expectedOutcome: pipeline scaffold created: skills/, templates/, pipeline-state.json
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill exits early without creating pipeline-state.json, leaving the repository without a functional governance state file
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for presence of required scaffold outputs — not for which steps the agent took

scenarios.description: branch-complete skill opens a draft PR and does not mark it ready for review
scenarios.expectedOutcome: draft PR opened — not marked ready for review
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill marks PR ready for review, bypassing the human merge gate
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for draft-only PR status — not for the specific gh CLI command used

scenarios.description: branch-setup skill creates an isolated worktree and confirms a clean baseline test run passes
scenarios.expectedOutcome: worktree created and baseline tests pass
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill creates the worktree but skips the baseline verification, allowing implementation to begin on a broken baseline
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for worktree creation and baseline pass result — not for which git commands were run

scenarios.description: clarify skill produces an updated discovery artefact with answered questions logged and scope gaps addressed
scenarios.expectedOutcome: discovery artefact updated with clarification log
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill asks questions but does not update the discovery artefact, leaving scope gaps unresolved
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for artefact update and clarification log presence — not for number of questions asked

scenarios.description: coverage-map skill produces a map that classifies each test by type and lists gaps with risk ratings
scenarios.expectedOutcome: coverage map produced with gap classification
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill lists tests without gap classification, hiding untested ACs before a release gate
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for gap-classified map output — not for the rendering format used

scenarios.description: decisions skill records a decision with rationale and writes it to the feature decisions log
scenarios.expectedOutcome: decision recorded in artefacts/
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill captures the decision verbally but does not write it to decisions.md, leaving no auditable record
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for persisted decision record — not for the classification track used

scenarios.description: definition skill produces at least one epic and one story artefact with all required sections populated
scenarios.expectedOutcome: epic and story artefacts written to artefacts/
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill emits story outlines without running the scope accumulator, missing scope drift across the full set
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for artefact existence and required section presence — not for which slicing strategy was chosen

scenarios.description: definition-of-done skill produces a DoD artefact that records AC coverage and any deviations
scenarios.expectedOutcome: DoD artefact written with AC coverage table
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill marks story done without an AC coverage table, hiding uncovered ACs
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for DoD artefact with coverage table — not for which inspection steps were followed

scenarios.description: definition-of-ready skill produces a DoR artefact where all hard blocks pass and a coding agent instructions block is present
scenarios.expectedOutcome: DoR artefact written with all hard blocks passed and coding agent instructions present
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill produces a DoR with unresolved hard blocks, allowing incomplete stories to reach the coding agent
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for DoR hard-block pass status and coding agent instructions block — not for checklist order

scenarios.description: discovery skill produces a discovery artefact at the expected path with all required sections populated
scenarios.expectedOutcome: discovery artefact written to artefacts/
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill exits without writing the discovery artefact, leaving no structured problem statement for downstream pipeline stages
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for artefact existence and required section presence — not for how many clarifying questions were asked

scenarios.description: ea-registry skill creates or updates a registry entry with application name, domain, and interface list
scenarios.expectedOutcome: registry entry written to registry/
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill populates the registry entry without listing interfaces, leaving blast-radius analysis incomplete
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for registry entry existence with interface list — not for which mode (QUERY/CONTRIBUTE/AUDIT) was invoked

scenarios.description: ideate skill produces a structured ideation artefact with at least one lens applied and a decision table
scenarios.expectedOutcome: ideation artefact produced with decision table
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill applies a lens but omits the decision table, leaving lens outputs disconnected from discovery decisions
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for artefact with decision table — not for which lens was chosen

scenarios.description: implementation-plan skill produces a plan with file-level task breakdown including exact file paths and expected command output
scenarios.expectedOutcome: implementation plan written with file-level task breakdown
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill emits high-level task descriptions without file paths, leaving the implementing agent unable to locate affected files
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for file-path presence in plan tasks — not for how many tasks were generated

scenarios.description: implementation-review skill produces a review with both Stage 1 (spec compliance) and Stage 2 (code quality) findings
scenarios.expectedOutcome: implementation review produced with Stage 1 and Stage 2 findings
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill only runs Stage 1 and skips Stage 2, missing structural code-quality issues before PR open
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for both stage findings in output — not for the severity breakdown

scenarios.description: issue-dispatch skill creates a GitHub issue with the story content and records issueUrl in pipeline-state.json
scenarios.expectedOutcome: GitHub issue created and issueUrl recorded in pipeline-state.json
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill creates the issue but does not write issueUrl to pipeline-state.json, breaking dispatch tracking
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for issue creation and state write — not for which issue body target was used

scenarios.description: levelup skill extracts at least one reusable pattern from the merged story and writes it to the standards or decisions log
scenarios.expectedOutcome: pattern extracted and written to standards or decisions
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill runs post-merge but writes no standards update, leaving institutional knowledge ephemeral
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for persisted pattern output — not for which category classification was applied

scenarios.description: loop-design skill produces a documented loop design with an inner-loop slot contract
scenarios.expectedOutcome: loop design artefact written with inner-loop slot contract
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill documents the outer loop but omits the inner-loop slot contract, preventing teams from swapping inner-loop toolchains
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for loop design artefact with slot contract — not for which inner-loop variant was chosen

scenarios.description: metric-review skill produces an updated or supplementary benefit-metric artefact with a re-baselined target
scenarios.expectedOutcome: metric review artefact written with re-baselined target
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill runs the review but writes no updated metric artefact, leaving stale targets in the pipeline state
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for updated artefact with re-baselined target — not for the checkpoint trigger type

scenarios.description: org-mapping skill produces a translation matrix mapping pipeline terminology to organisation-specific labels
scenarios.expectedOutcome: org-mapping artefact written with translation matrix
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill maps some terms but omits governance hooks, leaving the pipeline incompatible with the organisation's approval process
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for translation matrix presence — not for how many terminology mappings were created

scenarios.description: programme skill produces a programme artefact that lists at least one workstream with cross-workstream dependencies
scenarios.expectedOutcome: programme artefact written with workstream list
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill creates the programme artefact without capturing cross-workstream dependencies, hiding blocking relationships
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for programme artefact with workstream list — not for how dependencies were elicited

scenarios.description: record-signal skill writes a metric signal with status and lastMeasured timestamp to pipeline-state.json
scenarios.expectedOutcome: metric signal recorded in pipeline-state.json with lastMeasured
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill captures the signal verbally but does not write to pipeline-state.json, breaking the benefit-metric measurement loop
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for pipeline state write with lastMeasured field — not for which measurement source was used

scenarios.description: release skill produces release notes in both technical and plain-language forms, and a deployment checklist
scenarios.expectedOutcome: release notes and deployment checklist produced
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill emits technical release notes but omits the plain-language summary, leaving stakeholder communications incomplete
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for both release note forms and deployment checklist — not for how changes were grouped

scenarios.description: reverse-engineer skill produces a report with at least Layer 1 through Layer 4 of the six-layer analysis populated
scenarios.expectedOutcome: reverse-engineering report written with six-layer analysis
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill stops after surface-level API mapping and omits the hidden-logic and data-contract layers, leaving business rules undocumented
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for report with required layers populated — not for analysis depth on any one layer

scenarios.description: review skill produces a FINDINGS → SCORE → VERDICT output for the reviewed artefact
scenarios.expectedOutcome: review completed with FINDINGS, SCORE, and VERDICT
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill produces findings without a score or verdict, leaving stakeholders unable to determine whether the artefact is ready to proceed
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for FINDINGS, SCORE, and VERDICT presence — not for finding category distribution

scenarios.description: scale-pipeline skill produces an artefact documenting the control-plane design for multi-team adoption
scenarios.expectedOutcome: scale-pipeline artefact written with control plane design
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill describes scaling patterns without a control-plane design, leaving multi-team governance undefined
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for artefact with control-plane design section — not for team-count projection

scenarios.description: spike skill concludes with one of the three valid verdicts: PROCEED, REDESIGN, or DEFER
scenarios.expectedOutcome: spike concluded with verdict: PROCEED, REDESIGN, or DEFER
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill runs the spike investigation but emits no verdict, leaving the decision open and blocking downstream work
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for PROCEED/REDESIGN/DEFER verdict presence — not for which investigation steps were taken

scenarios.description: subagent-execution skill produces a result status of DONE, DONE_WITH_CONCERNS, or NEEDS_CONTEXT for each delegated task
scenarios.expectedOutcome: subagent task completed with status DONE, DONE_WITH_CONCERNS, or NEEDS_CONTEXT
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill delegates tasks without capturing per-task status, hiding partial failures in multi-task batches
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for per-task status output — not for how the subagent was instructed

scenarios.description: systematic-debugging skill produces a root-cause finding before any fix is applied
scenarios.expectedOutcome: root cause identified before fix applied
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill applies a fix without identifying root cause, leaving the underlying defect unresolved and re-manifesting later
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for root-cause finding in output — not for which diagnostic phase was reached

scenarios.description: tdd skill produces a failing test before any production code is written, then a passing test after minimal code is added
scenarios.expectedOutcome: RED test written before production code; GREEN test passes after minimal implementation
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill writes production code first and then retrofits tests, voiding the TDD discipline and allowing implementation to drift from the spec
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for RED-before-GREEN observable sequence — not for test framework or assertion style

scenarios.description: test-plan skill produces a test plan where every AC maps to at least one test
scenarios.expectedOutcome: test plan written with every AC covered by at least one test
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill produces a test plan with uncovered ACs, allowing stories to pass DoR with unmeasured acceptance criteria
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for full AC coverage in the test plan — not for test-ID naming conventions

scenarios.description: token-optimization skill produces an artefact with a token budget policy and stage-by-stage model routing
scenarios.expectedOutcome: token-optimization artefact written with token budget policy
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill documents model routing without a token budget policy, leaving cost overruns undetected until billing
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for token budget policy presence — not for which model routing variant was recommended

scenarios.description: trace skill produces a chain report that identifies all artefact links from discovery to DoD for a named story
scenarios.expectedOutcome: trace chain report written with full artefact link coverage
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill runs the chain walk but omits broken-link detection, allowing orphaned artefacts to accumulate silently
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for chain report with link coverage — not for number of chain levels traversed

scenarios.description: verify-completion skill confirms AC coverage against the verification script before any completion claim is made
scenarios.expectedOutcome: verification completed with AC coverage confirmed against verification script
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill allows a completion claim without fresh verification evidence, letting uncovered ACs reach the PR merge
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for AC coverage confirmation against verification script — not for manual vs automated verification split

scenarios.description: workflow skill routes the session to the correct pipeline stage and produces a pipeline health note
scenarios.expectedOutcome: workflow navigation produced with pipeline health note
scenarios.failurePatternGuarded: Skill routes to the short track without confirming the session genuinely qualifies, bypassing required pipeline stages
scenarios.reviewNote: Outcome-orientation confirmed: tests for pipeline health note and routing output — not for which stage the session landed in
